name: xr-touch-widget
description: Root delegator so `npm run dev|build` works regardless of the directory Tauri runs beforeDev/BuildCommand from. Different tauri-cli versions use different CWDs (local cargo-tauri runs them in ui/, CI's tauri-cli runs them at the repo root), and npm resolves the nearest package.json up the tree: from ui/ it uses ui/package.json directly; from the root or app/ it lands here and delegates to ui via --prefix.
